author: Matt Wardlaw
body:
I wasn’t quite sure what to expect from this album….from the 9 minute long lead single…but like you, I was happy as well!

Good stuff!

author: Burgo
body: Great minds obviously think alike Matt :)

author: Kalena
body: Ice is Getting Thinner – such a haunting, poignant song \*sniff\*. Might have to buy this album, thanks for the sample Burgo

author: Burgo
body:
@ Kalena,

Thanks for dropping by! It’s a killer track, isn’t it? That last time that Ben Gibbard plaintively sings:

> “Then it saddens me to say what we both knew was true  
> That the ice was getting thinner under me and you”

… man, it just gets me.

author: Kalena
body: @ admin – ditto. I love musicians who totally nail timing and understatement
